folio:
Wylt thow thanne go thy wey , ther witú q¶ she
ña certis le~man , q¶ this Absolouö
Than make the redy q¶ she , I come a nonö
This Absolouö doun sette hi~ , on his knees
And seyde , I am a lord , at alle degrees
For after this , I hope there cometh more
Le~man thy grace , and swete brede thyn ore
The wyndowe she vn doth , and that in hast
Haue I don q¶ she , come of & spede the fast
Leste that oure neyghebores , the espie
This Alisouö gan wype , his mouth ful drye
Derke was the nygút , as pycú or as the cole
And at the wyndowe , ou©t she put hire hole
And Absolouö hi~ fel , neither bet ne wers
But with his moutú , he kiste hire naked ers¢ Nota quid malum546 A gloss in the right margin .ES
Ful sauerly , er he were war of this
A bak he stirte , and æou©t it was a mys
For wele he wyst , a wo~man had no berd
He felt a thyng al row , and longe I hered
And seide fy allas , what haue I do
¢ Te he q¶ she , and clapped the wyndowe to
And Absolouö goth forth , a sory pace
A berd a berd , seide hende Nicholas
By goddes corpus , this gotú fair & wele
This sely Absolouö , herd euäydele
And on his lyppe , for anger he gan to byte
And to hi~ self he seide , I shal the quyte
¢ cWho rubbeth now , who froteth now hise lippes559 Erased red paraph in the margin. The paraph was partially cancelled, the folio was damaged: a hole. The cc is still visible.ODR
With dust , w sond , w strawe , w cloth , w chippes
But Absolouö that seith , ful ofte allas
My soule be take I , vn to Satanas
But me were leuere , than al this toun q¶ he
Of this dispyt , a wreken for to be
Allas q¶ he , allas I ne hadde I blent
His hote loue was cold , and al I queynt
For fro æ tyme , that he had kist hire ers
Of paramours , ne rougút he nat a kers
For he was heled , of his maladye
Ful ofte paramours , he gan defye
And wepe , as doth a child , æ is I bete
A soft pas he went hi~ , ouä the strete
Vn to a Smytú , men callen Daun Garueys
That in his forge , smethed plougú harneys
He sharpeth shaare , and cultur besily
This Absolouö , knokketh , al esily576 Compression of the last four lines. F46 is extremelly dirty, like 45v. Check if there is a relationship with the manuscript being unboundODR
